packageRules.description: Group all minor and patch updates (excluding stapel-*) into a single weekly PR to cut review noise.

stapel-* pins (stapel-core and sibling stapel libs) follow the manual release wave per library-standard §7, not Renovate automation. Group is intentionally disabled: do not auto-bump stapel pins. Window upgrades (e.g. <0.9 -> <0.10) are a deliberate, tested step done by hand, not an automated PR.
packageRules.groupName: stapel-* (manual release wave, do not auto-bump)
